use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH KRAS G12C-MUTATED LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC), AS DETERMINED BY AN FDA-APPROVED TEST, WHO HAVE RECEIVED AT LEAST ONE PRIOR SYSTEMIC THERAPY

indications.text:
LUMAKRAS is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with KRAS G12C-mutated locally advanced or
metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), as determined by an FDA-approved test [see Dosage and
Administration (2.1)], who have received at least one prior systemic therapy.
This indication is a...

1.1 KRAS G12C-mutated Locally Advanced or Metastatic Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
(NSCLC)

locally advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), as determined by an FDA-approved
